claimSummary: Dubuque says its pilot-program page links to an online water service line inventory map, a spreadsheet, and a reporter form for customers to verify unknown service material while the city prepares to replace about 585 private lead service lines in three phases.
reviewerNote: Official City of Dubuque pilot page reviewed manually for map, reporter-form, and pilot-scope details.

claimSummary: Dubuque explains lead health risk, tells residents to use the reporter form or request an inspection when they are unsure, and says selected pilot participants receive direct follow-up from the Water Department.
reviewerNote: Official City of Dubuque pilot page reviewed manually for notification and follow-up language.

claimSummary: Dubuque says the private lead service line replacement pilot will replace about 585 lines over three phases starting in 2024 and uses an interest form consent workflow and address selection process.
reviewerNote: Official City of Dubuque pilot page reviewed manually for pilot-program intake workflow and replacement scope.

publisherName: City of Sioux City Water Plant
claimSummary: Sioux City directs residents to an online lead service line inventory page for address-level service material review and pairs that inventory with city notice updates for properties that may still have lead-related service materials.
reviewerNote: Official City of Sioux City inventory endpoint reviewed manually via published city news references.

publisherName: City of Sioux City Water Plant
claimSummary: Sioux City says about 7300 properties could potentially have a lead service line or a galvanized service line affected by lead and points residents back to the online inventory for address-level review.
reviewerNote: Official City of Sioux City news post reviewed manually for published inventory and notice count language.

claimSummary: Hastings says its utility water page points residents to the city's water survey and safer water guidance while the linked replacement program reports about 1500 current lead water service lines.
reviewerNote: Official Hastings utilities water page reviewed manually for survey guidance and linked program context.

claimSummary: Hastings publishes customer letters monthly progress and neighborhood updates through its Water Main and Lead Service Replacement Program hub and reports 279 lead water services replaced so far.
reviewerNote: Official Engage Hastings project page reviewed manually for letter and progress-update links.

claimSummary: Hastings says it started the water main and lead service replacement program in 2022, currently has about 1500 lead water service lines, has replaced 279 so far, and aims to remove all lead water services in 10 years.
reviewerNote: Official Engage Hastings project page reviewed manually for active program scope progress and timeline.
